main.description: An agent skill record that describes a capability the agent can perform, with examples and property references.

description.description: Instructions for when and how to use this skill.

examples.description: Strong references to example records demonstrating this skill.

property_references.description: Annotated path-value pairs describing fields within the example records. Each entry either carries a literal string value or a strongRef that resolves (recursively) to the value at that path.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this skill record was created.

propertyReference.description: A single path-annotated value reference within a skill's example records. Carries either a literal string or a strongRef pointing to the value.

path.description: JSONPath-like dotted path into the resolved example tree, e.g. '.examples[].value.payload.value.user_data'.

ref.description: Strong reference to a record that contains the example data.
